title: Remove Solution Formulas from Level Descriptions
summary: Level descriptions currently give away solutions by including formulas (e.g., 'NAND = NOT(AND)'), gate counts ('You need TWO gates'), and step-by-step wiring instructions. Strip all descriptions down to truth table + conceptual framing only. Add a new 'postSolveInsight' field to each level that reveals the mathematical principle as a reward AFTER solving. Show this insight in the star display area upon level completion.

tasks.description: Rewrite all 15 level descriptions in js/levels.js to remove formulas, gate counts, and solution hints. Keep only truth-table-relevant conceptual framing (what the circuit does, not how to build it).
acceptance_criteria: No level description contains an equals-sign formula (e.g., 'NAND = NOT(AND)')
No level description mentions a specific gate count (e.g., 'TWO gates', 'one-gate')
No level description tells the player which gates to chain or in what order
Each description still conveys what the output behavior should be (conceptual framing)
Levels 1-3 (single-gate teaching levels) may name the gate type since only one gate is available
Level 6 (XOR) may name XOR since it's the only available gate

tasks.description: Add a 'postSolveInsight' string field to each of the 15 LEVELS entries in js/levels.js. This text reveals the formula/principle after the player solves the level.
acceptance_criteria: All 15 levels have a non-empty 'postSolveInsight' string
Insights contain the formulas that were removed from descriptions (e.g., De Morgan's law for levels 8-9)
Insights feel like a reward — fun facts, real-world connections, or 'aha' moments

tasks.description: Display the postSolveInsight in the star display area after level completion. Add a new DOM element below the star message in the #star-display section, and populate it in ui.js showStarDisplay().
acceptance_criteria: After solving a campaign level, the insight text appears below the star count
The insight has a distinct visual style (e.g., different color, icon prefix like 🔓)
The insight does NOT appear for challenge mode or sandbox mode
The insight is hidden when the star display is hidden (on new level load or clear)

testing_focus: Read every level description in-game and verify no solution formulas remain
Complete at least one level and verify the post-solve insight appears
Verify insights don't appear in challenge/sandbox modes
Check that level descriptions are still helpful enough to understand the goal
rollback_criteria: If any level becomes unsolvable or the UI breaks, revert to previous commit
